_comment: Extraction-quality bars for the email action-item eval (#1605 / PR #1917, eval #1949). Scored by gaia.eval.action_item_metrics over the hand-labeled corpus action_items_ground_truth.json (set-based precision/recall/F1 with normalized+fuzzy description matching). 'enforce' is the SINGLE switch CI keys off, and it ships FALSE (report mode) on purpose: these are REPORTED targets, not enforced gates — the corpus is a ~26-case seed and the bars should only start blocking builds once the corpus grows past seed size and the numbers prove stable across a few nightly reports. Flip 'enforce' to true HERE (data, not code) to make a breach fail the build. Loaded by gaia.eval.action_item_metrics.load_action_item_thresholds.
_baseline: Measured on the deterministic cue-based extractor (EmailTriageService._extract_action_items) over the committed 26-case corpus: precision 0.8889, recall 0.8421, f1 0.8649, due_hint_accuracy 1.0, negatives clean 8/10. The bars sit below the measured baseline with jitter-free margin (the extractor is deterministic, so any drop below a bar is a real code-behavior change, not noise).
